title: BigBear.ai, Inc. Common Stock (BBAI) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts | Nasdaq
text: Nasdaq provides comprehensive earnings data for BigBear.ai (BBAI). The company's next earnings report is scheduled for August 10, 2026. BigBear.ai reported Q1 2026 revenue of $34.4 million with an EPS loss of -$0.12. For Q2 2026, analyst estimates project EPS of -$0.05. Full-year 2026 revenue guidance stands at $135-165 million, implying approximately 17% growth at the midpoint. The historical earnings data shows BigBear.ai has consistently reported losses, with Q1 2026 net loss of $56.8 million and annual losses anticipated to continue through 2026. However, gross margin expansion to 34% from 21.3% signals improving profitability dynamics as the company scales higher-margin AI products. Analyst consensus rating for BBAI is Hold with an average price target of $5.33, representing approximately 25% upside from recent trading levels. The earnings calendar shows a history of earnings surprises, with the company occasionally beating or missing analyst expectations.
